kba_problem_summary: Microsoft DCOM hardening (CVE-2021-26414, enforced by default after March 2023 updates) breaks classic OPC DA/A&E/HDA client connectivity for multiple DeltaV applications unless specific hotfixes or upgrades are applied.
severity_justification: Loss of OPC connectivity impacts data access, alarms, batch operations, SIEM and third-party integrations, with potential degradation of production visibility and control in distributed architectures; elevated to Mandatory action.
occurrence_justification: DCOM hardening is now enabled by default; affected applications fail when Microsoft updates are applied without corresponding DeltaV hotfixes, especially in distributed (non-local) setups.
detectability_justification: Detectable through Windows Event Logs (IDs 10036/10037/10038) and explicit connectivity testing; not silent but requires proactive verification rather than automatic alerting.

modifiers_applied.reason: Hotfixes provided for v13.3.2 and all v14.x Feature Packs
Registry setting can disable hardening but is not permanent and not recommended after March 2023

architecture_level_description: Livello 3: Gestione operativa (OPC services, Batch, Historian, SIEM, engineering tools)
workaround_description: Registry key HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Ole\AppCompat\RequireIntegrityActivationAuthenticationLevel set to 0 (temporary only; requires restart and not viable after March 2023 updates).
divergence_explanation: Emerson labels as 'Product Issues' with 'Mandatory' required action, indicating higher operational urgency than a standard Advisory; no explicit Alert/Advisory/Informational tag used.
red_flags: No fix available for v13.3.1 and some early v14 versions (upgrade needed)
Affects multiple critical OPC, Batch and SIEM components
Third-party OPC clients may require separate vendor updates
notes: Local OPC client access (same machine) is unaffected. Only network DCOM communications are impacted. DRDC requires matching patch levels between VM and Thin Client. Several internal DeltaV services require recompilation (e.g. Softphases) after applying both DeltaV hotfix and Microsoft updates.
